decisions_made: Three-layer KB: domain (what we know), methods (how we do it), components (reusable parts)
8 standardized templates for different knowledge types
OpenClaw integration: pre-build a 10-month-old config seed, not start from scratch
Memory architecture: daily markdown logs + curated MEMORY.md + vector index for semantic search
Continuum checkpoints at major milestones for state snapshots
Evaluating DigitalOcean droplet vs Mac for OpenClaw deployment
SysAdmin identity fully specified: Swedish-fluent, production-grade, wave-protocol native
next_priorities: Complete OpenClaw seed files (workspace, memory logs, auth profiles, sessions)
Test seed config on fresh OpenClaw installation
Populate KB domain/ with SEO and agent architecture knowledge
First overnight session using OpenClaw as the execution platform
